---
title: "R packages"
page-layout: article
toc: false
comments: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── filter row ── */
.pkg-filters {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  margin: 1.5rem 0 2rem;
}
.pkg-filter-btn {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  padding: 5px 16px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 1px solid #c8d8e4;
  background: transparent;
  color: #555;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
}
.pkg-filter-btn:hover:not(.active) {
  background: #f0f5f8;
  border-color: #06436e;
  color: #06436e;
}
.pkg-filter-btn.active {
  background: #06436e;
  border-color: #06436e;
  color: #ffffff;
}

/* ── grid ── */
.pkg-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 16px;
}

/* ── card ── */
.pkg-card {
  display: flex;
  gap: 18px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.25rem 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #dde6ed;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #ffffff;
  transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
}
.pkg-card:hover {
  border-color: #06436e;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(6,67,110,0.08);
}
.pkg-card[style*="display: none"] { display: none !important; }

/* ── logo ── */
.pkg-logo {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 88px;
  height: 88px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.pkg-logo img {
  width: 88px;
  height: 88px;
  object-fit: contain;
}
.pkg-logo svg {
  width: 78px;
  height: 88px;
}

/* ── content ── */
.pkg-content {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}
.pkg-name {
  font-family: 'Gelasio', 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #06436e;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.pkg-desc {
  font-size: 0.87rem;
  color: #444;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.55;
}
.pkg-footer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-top: 4px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
}
.pkg-badges {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 5px;
  align-items: center;
}
.pkg-badge {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 2px 9px;
  border-radius: 20px;
}
/* category */
.badge-data     { background: #daeaf7; color: #0c4474; }
.badge-tseries  { background: #d5efe6; color: #0f5040; }
.badge-viz      { background: #ece9fd; color: #3c3489; }
.badge-census   { background: #fef0d6; color: #7a4d0a; }
/* status */
.badge-stable   { background: #d4edda; color: #155724; }
.badge-dev      { background: #fff3cd; color: #7a4f00; }
/* CRAN */
.badge-cran     { background: #6c757d; color: #ffffff; }

.pkg-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: center;
}
.pkg-link {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #06436e;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  opacity: 0.75;
  transition: opacity 0.15s;
}
.pkg-link:hover { opacity: 1; text-decoration: underline; }
.pkg-link svg { width: 13px; height: 13px; flex-shrink: 0; }
</style>

<p style="color:#555; font-size:0.95rem; max-width:56ch; margin-bottom:0.25rem;">
Open-source R packages for Brazilian economic data, time series analysis,
and ggplot2 visualization themes.
</p>

<div class="pkg-filters">
  <button class="pkg-filter-btn active" onclick="filterPkgs('all',this)">All</button>
  <button class="pkg-filter-btn" onclick="filterPkgs('data',this)">Data</button>
  <button class="pkg-filter-btn" onclick="filterPkgs('tseries',this)">Time series</button>
  <button class="pkg-filter-btn" onclick="filterPkgs('viz',this)">Visualization</button>
  <button class="pkg-filter-btn" onclick="filterPkgs('census',this)">Census</button>
</div>

<div class="pkg-grid" id="pkg-grid">

  <!-- realestatebr -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="data">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <img
        src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/viniciusoike/realestatebr/main/man/figures/hexlogo.png"
        alt="realestatebr hex logo"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='block'">
      <svg style="display:none" viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#06436e"/>
        <text x="36" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="#fff" dy="-5">real</text>
        <text x="36" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="#fff" dy="7">estate</text>
        <text x="36" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="#b5d4f4" dy="19">br</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">realestatebr</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">Access to Brazilian real estate market data from multiple official sources: the Central Bank of Brazil (BCB), ABRAINC, ABECIP, FGV/IBRE, and the Bank for International Settlements (BIS). All datasets are returned in a tidy format via a single <code>get_dataset()</code> interface.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-data">Data</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-cran">CRAN</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-stable">Stable</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://viniciusoike.github.io/realestatebr/" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
            Package website
          </a>
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/realestatebr" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- trendseries -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="tseries">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <img
        src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/viniciusoike/trendseries/main/man/figures/logo.png"
        alt="trendseries hex logo"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='block'">
      <svg style="display:none" viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#0f6e56"/>
        <polyline points="14,58 24,44 31,50 41,30 51,37 60,24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="700" fill="#9fe1cb">trendseries</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">trendseries</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">Extract trends, cycles, and seasonal components from monthly and quarterly economic time series. Provides <code>augment_trends()</code>, <code>decompose_series()</code>, <code>deseason_series()</code>, and <code>detrend_series()</code> for pipe-friendly tibble workflows, plus <code>extract_trends()</code> for <code>ts</code>/<code>xts</code>/<code>zoo</code> objects. Includes 20 methods spanning econometric filters (HP, Hamilton, Baxter-King, Christiano-Fitzgerald, UCM), smoothing (STL, loess, splines), and moving averages, with frequency-aware defaults.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-tseries">Time series</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-cran">CRAN</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-stable">Stable</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://viniciusoike.github.io/trendseries/" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
            Package website
          </a>
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/trendseries" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- metrosp -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="data">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <img
        src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/viniciusoike/metrosp/main/man/figures/logo.png"
        alt="metrosp hex logo"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='block'">
      <svg style="display:none" viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#185fa5"/>
        <circle cx="36" cy="38" r="13" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.2"/>
        <circle cx="36" cy="38" r="5" fill="#b5d4f4"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="#b5d4f4">metrosp</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">metrosp</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">Passenger demand data for the São Paulo metro system covering 2012–2026. Datasets include monthly line totals, average weekday station entries, daily station counts, and spatial geometries for metro and commuter train lines and stations.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-data">Data</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-cran">CRAN</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-stable">Stable</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://viniciusoike.github.io/metrosp/" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
            Package website
          </a>
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/metrosp" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- infosigasp -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="data">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <img
        src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/viniciusoike/infosigasp/main/man/figures/logo.png"
        alt="infosigasp hex logo"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='block'">
      <svg style="display:none" viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#b34227"/>
        <polygon points="36,25 51,51 21,51" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        <line x1="36" y1="34" x2="36" y2="43" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        <circle cx="36" cy="47.5" r="1.5" fill="#fff"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="700" fill="#f4c7bd">infosigasp</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">infosigasp</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">Programmatic access to open traffic-crash data from INFOSIGA-SP, the São Paulo State traffic accident system maintained by DETRAN-SP. Downloads and imports tidy data frames of crash events (<code>sinistros</code>), victims (<code>pessoas</code>), and vehicles (<code>veiculos</code>) from 2015 onward, handling source encoding, decimal marks, date formats, and on-disk caching.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-data">Data</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-stable">Stable</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://viniciusoike.github.io/infosigasp/" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
            Package website
          </a>
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/infosigasp" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- insperplot -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="viz">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <img
        src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/viniciusoike/insperplot/main/man/figures/logo.png"
        alt="insperplot hex logo"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='block'">
      <svg style="display:none" viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#8b1c3c"/>
        <rect x="18" y="32" width="9" height="18" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <rect x="31" y="24" width="9" height="26" rx="1" fill="#f4c0d1"/>
        <rect x="44" y="36" width="9" height="14" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="700" fill="#f4c0d1">insperplot</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">insperplot</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">Extends ggplot2 with <a href="https://www.insper.edu.br" target="_blank">Insper</a>'s visual identity. Custom themes, color palettes (qualitative, sequential, and diverging), and specialized plotting functions for academic and institutional use.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-viz">Visualization</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-stable">Stable</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://viniciusoike.github.io/insperplot/" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
            Package website
          </a>
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/insperplot" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- benviplot -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="viz">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <img
        src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/viniciusoike/benviplot/master/man/figures/logo_cropped.png"
        alt="benviplot hex logo"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='block'">
      <svg style="display:none" viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#3b6d11"/>
        <rect x="18" y="32" width="9" height="18" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <rect x="31" y="24" width="9" height="26" rx="1" fill="#c0dd97"/>
        <rect x="44" y="36" width="9" height="14" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="700" fill="#c0dd97">benviplot</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">benviplot</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">ggplot2 scale functions and a custom theme derived from the Benvi visual identity of QuintoAndar Group (discontinued in 2024). Qualitative, sequential, and diverging palettes with both discrete and continuous scale variants. Includes Poppins font support and high-level chart helpers.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-viz">Visualization</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-stable">Stable</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://viniciusoike.github.io/benviplot/" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
            Package website
          </a>
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/benviplot" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ekioplot -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="viz">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <img
        src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/viniciusoike/ekioplot/master/man/figures/logo.png"
        alt="ekioplot hex logo"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='block'">
      <svg style="display:none" viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#854f0b"/>
        <rect x="18" y="32" width="9" height="18" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <rect x="31" y="24" width="9" height="26" rx="1" fill="#fac775"/>
        <rect x="44" y="36" width="9" height="14" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="700" fill="#fac775">ekioplot</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">ekioplot</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">ggplot2 implementation of EKIO's visual identity. Professional themes, curated color palettes, and scale functions for ggplot2 and gt tables. Smart font detection with safe fallbacks and high-level recipe functions for common chart types.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-viz">Visualization</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-dev">Developing</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/ekioplot" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- claudeplot -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="viz">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <img
        src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/viniciusoike/claudeplot/main/man/figures/logo.png"
        alt="claudeplot hex logo"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='block'">
      <svg style="display:none" viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#d97757"/>
        <rect x="18" y="32" width="9" height="18" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <rect x="31" y="24" width="9" height="26" rx="1" fill="#f7d9cb"/>
        <rect x="44" y="36" width="9" height="14" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="700" fill="#f7d9cb">claudeplot</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">claudeplot</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">A ggplot2 extension bringing the visual language of Anthropic and Claude to R. Provides a publication-ready theme; qualitative, sequential, and diverging palettes drawn from Anthropic's brand; discrete and continuous colour and fill scales; and palette display helpers. Bundles the recommended open typefaces (Poppins and Lora) and registers them automatically.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-viz">Visualization</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-stable">Stable</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://viniciusoike.github.io/claudeplot/" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
            Package website
          </a>
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/claudeplot" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ggconsulting -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="viz">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#2d3a4a"/>
        <rect x="18" y="34" width="8" height="16" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <rect x="30" y="28" width="8" height="22" rx="1" fill="#c9a86a"/>
        <rect x="42" y="22" width="8" height="28" rx="1" fill="#fff"/>
        <polyline points="22,40 34,32 46,26 54,20" fill="none" stroke="#c9a86a" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="700" fill="#c9a86a">ggconsulting</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">ggconsulting</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">An opinionated ggplot2 extension for executive-grade consulting output. Ships archetype themes, curated palettes, scale helpers, locale-aware label helpers, and a data-aware polish layer for board-ready charts.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-viz">Visualization</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-dev">Developing</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://viniciusoike.github.io/ggconsulting/" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
            Package website
          </a>
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/ggconsulting" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- stratr -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="census">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#633806"/>
        <rect x="19" y="24" width="34" height="28" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="#fac775" stroke-width="1.8"/>
        <line x1="19" y1="33" x2="53" y2="33" stroke="#fac775" stroke-width="1.2"/>
        <line x1="19" y1="42" x2="53" y2="42" stroke="#fac775" stroke-width="1.2"/>
        <line x1="33" y1="24" x2="33" y2="52" stroke="#fac775" stroke-width="1.2"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="#fac775">stratr</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">stratr</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">Companion to <code>{rppi}</code> that builds geographic strata for a property price index using the 2010 Brazilian Census weighting area definitions. Addresses known inconsistencies in the original weighting structure.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-census">Census</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-stable">Stable</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/stratar/tree/main" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- odsp -->
  <div class="pkg-card" data-cat="data">
    <div class="pkg-logo">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 72 83" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="36,2 68,19.5 68,63.5 36,81 4,63.5 4,19.5" fill="#185fa5"/>
        <line x1="20" y1="38" x2="52" y2="38" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
        <circle cx="26" cy="30" r="4" fill="#b5d4f4"/>
        <circle cx="40" cy="44" r="4" fill="#fff"/>
        <circle cx="52" cy="28" r="4" fill="#b5d4f4"/>
        <circle cx="20" cy="48" r="4" fill="#fff"/>
        <text x="36" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="9.5" font-weight="700" fill="#b5d4f4">odsp</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-content">
      <p class="pkg-name">odsp</p>
      <p class="pkg-desc">Import, clean, and work with São Paulo Origin-Destination survey data in R. Provides a consistent interface to OD data for mobility analysis and urban transport research.</p>
      <div class="pkg-footer">
        <div class="pkg-badges">
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-data">Data</span>
          <span class="pkg-badge badge-dev">Developing</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-links">
          <a class="pkg-link" href="https://github.com/viniciusoike/odsp" target="_blank">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 .3a12 12 0 0 0-3.8 23.4c.6.1.8-.3.8-.6v-2c-3.3.7-4-1.6-4-1.6-.6-1.4-1.4-1.8-1.4-1.8-1-.7.1-.7.1-.7 1.2.1 1.8 1.2 1.8 1.2 1 1.8 2.8 1.3 3.5 1 .1-.8.4-1.3.7-1.6-2.7-.3-5.5-1.3-5.5-5.9 0-1.3.5-2.4 1.2-3.2 0-.4-.5-1.6.2-3.2 0 0 1-.3 3.3 1.2a11.5 11.5 0 0 1 6 0c2.3-1.5 3.3-1.2 3.3-1.2.7 1.6.2 2.8.1 3.2.8.8 1.2 1.9 1.2 3.2 0 4.6-2.8 5.6-5.5 5.9.4.4.8 1.1.8 2.2v3.3c0 .3.2.7.8.6A12 12 0 0 0 12 .3"/></svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
function filterPkgs(cat, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.pkg-filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.pkg-card').forEach(card => {
    card.style.display = (cat === 'all' || card.dataset.cat === cat) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}
</script>
```
